sop_examples.title: Low Pressure Warning
sop_examples.condition: Yellow light is flashing and pressure_sensor reads below threshold

sop_examples.title: Emergency Shutdown Procedure
sop_examples.condition: Red light is solid and machine is overheating

sop_examples.title: Machine Startup Sequence
sop_examples.condition: Green light is off and machine is idle
steps: Read all sensors to confirm normal operation

sop_examples.title: High Temperature Alert
sop_examples.condition: Yellow light is on and temperature_sensor reads above threshold

sop_examples.title: Vibration Anomaly Detection
sop_examples.condition: Yellow light is flashing and vibration_sensor reads abnormal

sop_examples.title: Diagnostic Mode Activation
steps: Press blue_button to enter diagnostic mode
Press blue_button to exit diagnostic mode

sop_examples.title: Warning Light Reset
sop_examples.condition: Yellow light is solid after issue resolved
steps: Read all sensor readings are normal

sop_examples.title: Intake Cover Inspection
sop_examples.condition: Yellow light is on and intake may be blocked

sop_examples.title: Lubrication Procedure
sop_examples.condition: Vibration_sensor reads high due to friction

sop_examples.title: Fault Light Investigation
sop_examples.condition: Red light is solid indicating fault

sop_examples.title: Fuse Replacement Procedure
sop_examples.condition: Red light is on and machine is unresponsive

sop_examples.title: Pressure Sensor Calibration Check
steps: Press blue_button to exit diagnostic mode

sop_examples.title: Temperature Sensor Verification
steps: Press blue_button for diagnostic if unstable

sop_examples.title: Machine Surface Cleaning
sop_examples.condition: Machine surface is dirty affecting operation
steps: Place cleaning_cloth on machine surface thoroughly

sop_examples.title: Bolt Tightening Procedure
sop_examples.condition: Vibration_sensor high due to loose bolts

sop_examples.title: Light Sensor Diagnostic
steps: Press blue_button to exit diagnostic mode

sop_examples.title: Intake Blockage Clearance
sop_examples.condition: Intake is blocked causing pressure drop

sop_examples.title: All Sensor Health Check
steps: Press blue_button to exit diagnostic mode

sop_examples.title: Green Light Verification
sop_examples.condition: Green light not illuminating after startup

sop_examples.title: Yellow Warning Acknowledgment
sop_examples.condition: Yellow light is on with no apparent issue

sop_examples.title: Controlled Restart After Fault
sop_examples.condition: Red light was on but issue has been resolved

sop_examples.title: Mode Selection Procedure
steps: Press blue_button three times for mode 3

sop_examples.title: Gradual Pressure Build Check
steps: Notify technician if pressure too high

sop_examples.title: Cooling Period Monitoring
steps: Notify technician when safe temperature reached

sop_examples.title: Screwdriver Maintenance Task
sop_examples.condition: Access panel needs opening for inspection

sop_examples.title: Routine Start of Day Check
sop_examples.condition: Machine idle at start of shift

sop_examples.title: Light Indicator Test
steps: Press blue_button to exit test mode

sop_examples.title: Red Button Function Test
steps: Press red_button to test emergency stop

sop_examples.title: Temperature Threshold Verification
steps: Notify technician if out of range

sop_examples.title: Simultaneous Light Warning
sop_examples.condition: Red and yellow lights are both on

sop_examples.title: Blinking Red Light Response
sop_examples.condition: Red light is blinking indicating intermittent fault

sop_examples.title: Blinking Yellow Light Response
sop_examples.condition: Yellow light is blinking indicating warning

sop_examples.title: Blinking Green Light Investigation
sop_examples.condition: Green light is blinking instead of solid

sop_examples.title: Intake Cover Seal Check
steps: Place cleaning_cloth on seal with cleaning_cloth

sop_examples.title: Cleaning Schedule Execution
steps: Place cleaning_cloth on surfaces with cleaning_cloth

sop_examples.title: Light Sensor Obstruction Check
steps: Place cleaning_cloth on light_sensor with cleaning_cloth

sop_examples.title: Loose Cable Detection
sop_examples.condition: Sensor readings intermittent due to loose cable

sop_examples.title: Startup Failure Recovery
sop_examples.condition: Machine fails to start on green_button press

sop_examples.title: Shutdown Failure Response
steps: Press and hold red_button for 5 seconds

sop_examples.title: Sensor Zero Calibration
sop_examples.condition: Sensor shows zero when it should not
steps: Place cleaning_cloth on sensor with cleaning_cloth

sop_examples.title: Sensor Maximum Reading
steps: Place cleaning_cloth on sensor with cleaning_cloth

sop_examples.condition: Safety goggles need cleaning before use

sop_examples.condition: Red light flashing with alarm sound
